Package de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op

Class UpdateJunctor

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.logic.op.AbstractOperator
org.key_project.logic.op.AbstractSortedOperator
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.AbstractSortedOperator
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.op.UpdateJunctor
All Implemented Interfaces:
Operator, Sorted, Named, Operator, SortedOperator, Sorted, SyntaxElement, EqualsModProofIrrelevancy
public final class UpdateJunctor extends AbstractSortedOperator
Class of update junctor operators, i.e., operators connecting a given number of updates to create another update. There are currently two such operators: the empty update "skip" and the parallel update connector "|".
